name: Pointer

unions.name: EventKind
unions.comment: Provides a classification of the type of event a pointer is performing.

unions.name: Handlers
unions.comment: A set of Handlers provides functions that turn pointer events into TEA events.

unions.name: Model
unions.comment: The internal model of the pointer.

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment:
Some configurable parameters of the Pointer.

    dragThreshold - how many pixels the pointer must move when engaged to be considered a drag.
    holdTimeMillis - how many milliseconds the pointer must hold down to be considered a hold.
    mouseWheelZoomStep - the zoom factor to assign to each mouse wheel step.
aliases.type: { dragThreshold : Basics.Int, holdTimeMillis : Basics.Int, mouseWheelZoomStep : Basics.Float }

aliases.name: DragArgs
aliases.comment: When a pointer is dragged it reports these values.
aliases.type: { startPos : Point2d.Point2d Pixels.Pixels coordinates, pos : Point2d.Point2d Pixels.Pixels coordinates, isFirstEvent : Basics.Bool }

aliases.name: PointArgs
aliases.comment: When a pointer is referencing a point on the screen it reports these args.
aliases.type: { button : Basics.Int, pos : Point2d.Point2d Pixels.Pixels coordinates }

aliases.name: PointerPorts
aliases.comment:
Defines the ports which this pointer module needs to listen to HTML pointer events on the
whole document.
aliases.type: { onPointerDown : (Json.Decode.Value -> msg) -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg, onPointerUp : (Json.Decode.Value -> msg) -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg, onPointerMove : (Json.Decode.Value -> msg) -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg, onPointerCancel : (Json.Decode.Value -> msg) -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg }

aliases.name: ScaleArgs
aliases.comment: When a pointer performs a scaling operation it reports these values.
aliases.type: { pos : Point2d.Point2d Pixels.Pixels coordinates, scale : Basics.Float }

values.name: apply
values.comment:
Applies a set of handlers to the pointer model. The resulting pointer model will generate TEA
events through the handlers.
values.type: Pointer.Handlers a msg coordinates -> Pointer.Model a msg coordinates -> Pointer.Model a msg coordinates

values.name: empty
values.comment: A default set of empty handlers that ignore all pointer events.

values.name: init
values.comment: Creates a new pointer model with no handlers set on it yet.
values.type: Maybe.Maybe Pointer.Config -> (Pointer.Msg a coordinates -> msg) -> Pointer.Model a msg coordinates

values.name: on
values.comment: Attaches a pointer model to a TEA view as a list of HTML event handler attributes.
values.type: Pointer.Model a msg coordinates -> (Pointer.EventKind -> Json.Decode.Decoder a) -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg)

values.name: onClick
values.type: Basics.Int -> { h | click : Pointer.PointArgs coordinates -> a -> msg } -> Pointer.Handlers a msg coordinates -> Pointer.Handlers a msg coordinates

values.name: onDoubleClick
values.type: Basics.Int -> { h | doubleClick : Pointer.PointArgs coordinates -> a -> msg } -> Pointer.Handlers a msg coordinates -> Pointer.Handlers a msg coordinates

values.name: onDrag
values.type: Basics.Int -> { h | drag : Pointer.DragArgs coordinates -> a -> a -> msg, dragEnd : Pointer.DragArgs coordinates -> a -> a -> msg } -> Pointer.Handlers a msg coordinates -> Pointer.Handlers a msg coordinates

values.name: onDragStart
values.type: Basics.Int -> { h | dragStart : Pointer.DragArgs coordinates -> a -> msg } -> Pointer.Handlers a msg coordinates -> Pointer.Handlers a msg coordinates

values.name: onMove
values.type: { h | move : Point2d.Point2d Pixels.Pixels coordinates -> a -> msg } -> Pointer.Handlers a msg coordinates -> Pointer.Handlers a msg coordinates

values.name: onPinch
values.comment: Adds a touch zoom pinch handler.
values.type: { h | pinch : Pointer.ScaleArgs coordinates -> a -> msg } -> Pointer.Handlers a msg coordinates -> Pointer.Handlers a msg coordinates

values.name: onPointerUp
values.type: Basics.Int -> { h | pointerUp : Pointer.PointArgs coordinates -> a -> msg } -> Pointer.Handlers a msg coordinates -> Pointer.Handlers a msg coordinates

values.name: onWheel
values.type: { h | wheel : Pointer.ScaleArgs coordinates -> a -> msg } -> Pointer.Handlers a msg coordinates -> Pointer.Handlers a msg coordinates

values.name: subscriptions
values.comment:
Defines the subscriptions a pointer needs to listen to HTML pointer events on whole document.

These events are not provided by `elm/browser` so must be accessed through ports. Consult the README
for instructions on how to set up the ports.
values.type: Pointer.PointerPorts msg -> Pointer.Model a msg coordinates -> (Pointer.EventKind -> Json.Decode.Decoder a) -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg

values.name: update
values.comment: The pointer update function, which should be applied to all pointer [Msgs](#Msg).
values.type: Pointer.Msg a coordinates -> Pointer.Model a msg coordinates -> ( Pointer.Model a msg coordinates, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )
